scripts.test: rm -rf /tmp/video-affiliate-worker-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --rootDir . --outDir /tmp/video-affiliate-worker-tests src/affiliate-verification-policy.ts src/avatar-settings.ts src/comment-link-registry.ts src/comment-targeting.ts src/comment-template.ts src/shortlink-template.ts src/shopee-affiliate-id.ts src/caption-link.ts src/report-proxy.ts src/page-video-asset-winners.ts src/page-post-inventory.ts src/facebook-page-posts.ts src/processed-video-asset-library.ts src/processing-dispatch.ts src/processing-retry-policy.ts src/posting-token-source.ts src/dashboard-session.ts src/ad-only-contract.ts src/ai-clips.ts src/post-log-tag.ts test/affiliate-verification-policy.test.ts test/avatar-settings.test.ts test/comment-link-registry.test.ts test/page-post-link-rewrite.test.ts test/comment-targeting.test.ts test/comment-template.test.ts test/shortlink-template.test.ts test/shopee-affiliate-id.test.ts test/caption-link.test.ts test/report-proxy.test.ts test/page-video-asset-winners.test.ts test/page-post-inventory.test.ts test/page-post-inventory-graph.test.ts test/facebook-page-posts.test.ts test/processed-video-asset-library.test.ts test/processing-dispatch.test.ts test/processing-retry-policy.test.ts test/posting-token-source.test.ts test/posting-token-source-admin-guard.test.ts test/fb-lite-refresh-wiring.test.ts test/dashboard-session.test.ts test/ad-only-contract.test.ts test/ad-only-queue.test.ts test/auto-ads-source-page.test.ts test/tagged-page-sync.test.ts test/stale-posting-recovery.test.ts test/recover-failed-history.test.ts test/multi-page-posting-claim.test.ts test/line-xhs-ack.test.ts test/line-video-cover-flow.test.ts test/telegram-xhs-ack.test.ts test/ai-clips.test.ts test/post-log-tag.test.ts && node --test /tmp/video-affiliate-worker-tests/test/*.test.js
